sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111711" key="flebotmh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φλεβο-τμής</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τμῆτος,</foreign> <sense id="n111711.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having a vein opened,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg004.perseus-grc1:2:98" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.98</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
